privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires calculating GDP per capita. The prompt mentions the column 'GDP_MD_EST', but in the actual dataset, this column has been renamed to 'GDP_MD'. The agent must adapt and use 'GDP_MD' in the formula: (GDP_MD * 1000000) / POP_EST. The target field must be named 'GDP_PCAP' (Type: Double, Length: 20, Precision: 2). The data is located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.dbf.
